inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 OCF ARS 247,029M minus PP&E and intangible capex ARS 12,241M, divided by 6,089,555k weighted shares; haircut from 38.6 to 33 for custody-fee repricing and portfolio working-capital noise
inputs.normalization_note: IAS 29 constant-currency FY2025 base; Q1 2026 ADTV +68% and one-off corporate-action fee ARS 4,700M not fully in starting cash flow

bear.notes: ARS devaluation shock; BCRA strategy reduces fixed-income/repo volumes; fee caps

base.notes: Mid-cycle volume after 2025 surge; CSD custody repricing embedded; exit ~16x owner cash

bull.notes: Sustained ADTV and AuC growth; Quantex cross-border option; margin holds above 70%

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light exchange and CSD; IAS 29 restated statements; no land/NAV misstatement pattern

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Croupier toll model; no commodity reserves

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: IAMC education segment small loss Q1 2026; immaterial to consolidated cash

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Activity-linked fee recognition on trading and custody volumes

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Quantex LLC 70% acquisition announced Jun 2026; cross-border payments option not in Lawrence base

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Operating croupier with ordinary dividend policy; not yield-curve trust

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: CSD market-value custody fee model (from Oct 2025) embedded in Caja de Valores revenue path

option_scan.question: Material options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Lawrence full cash-flow path sufficient for base; Quantex sized in bull sensitivity only

stance_proposal.override_reason: Mechanical IRR exceeds accumulate bar; Argentina currency and policy risk cap dhando at partial pending human sizing review

growth_explanation.mechanism: Trading and custody volumes (ADTV, AuC) times fee yield; Oct 2025 CSD repricing to market-value custody fees
growth_explanation.source: FY2025 annual report; 4Q25 and 1Q26 press releases
growth_explanation.bear_driver: Monetary-policy shift cuts fixed-income/repo ADTV; ARS devaluation
growth_explanation.bull_driver: Capital-markets deepening plus Quantex cross-border payments

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

top_dissents.label: Joel Greenblatt
top_dissents.falsifier: FCF yield below universe median OR base IRR below median

top_dissents.label: Mohnish Pabrai
top_dissents.falsifier: dhando -> none OR net-debt/EBITDA > 3 OR bear return < -15%

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
